description: Posts that detail menu items with specific ingredient lists, dish names, pricing, and restaurant location information to provide transparency and help followers make informed ordering decisions.
structural_recipe: Structure content by showcasing a food item with location tag, crediting the photo source, listing available menu variants, naming the specific dish, stating the price in SAR, and breaking down what makes this item unique or different from other menu options. Use Arabic and English bilingual captions. Format: Location → Photo credit → Menu options overview → Specific dish name → Price point.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value transparency in dining choices and price awareness. Breaking down ingredients and options builds trust with followers by demonstrating knowledge of menu details. Location tagging and pricing information help followers decide if they want to visit and budget accordingly. Bilingual format reaches broader audiences and reflects local market preferences.
transplantation_caveats: Price sensitivity varies by region within Saudi Arabia - ensure pricing context is appropriate for target audience
Halal certification and ingredient sourcing transparency are essential in Saudi market; omitting this can reduce credibility
Exact menu item names should match restaurant's official naming to avoid confusion
cultural_constraints: Must respect halal standards and clearly communicate them
Food photography should align with Saudi aesthetic preferences and not conflict with religious values
Bilingual Arabic-English presentation is important for market acceptance
